stories.title: Cape Verde blanks Spain in shocking WC draw
stories.summary: Spain were held to a 0-0 draw by 64th-ranked Cape Verde on Monday in the first major shock of the World Cup group stages.

stories.title: World Cup Daily Live: Cape Verde shock the world w...
stories.summary: Enjoy all the action from Monday's World Cup matches, with features, news, video analysis and color from around the competition.

stories.title: Peterson visits Wizards, won't meet other teams
stories.summary: Top NBA draft prospect Darryn Peterson has visited the Wizards but does not plan to grant another team a meeting, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Sources: Bulls finalizing hiring of Splitter as HC...
stories.summary: Chicago is finalizing the hire of Tiago Splitter, who guided the Trail Blazers to a 42-20 record, to succeed Billy Donovan as the Bulls' head coach, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Source: Pickens reports ahead of Cowboys' camp
stories.summary: As a precursor to this week's mandatory minicamp, Dallas Cowboys wide receiver George Pickens took his physical Monday at The Star, according to a source.
